category_title: Adolescent readers who internalize institutional 'struggling' labels despite high engagement in self-selected reading
scenario_title: Time-constrained required reading in traditional English
minimal_context: The student is asked to complete a required reading assignment from their traditional English class within a specific twenty-minute time limit.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please open your required English book to the next chapter. You have twenty minutes to complete the reading before the assignment is due.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: The reading parts, I suffer in 'cause I just don't like school reading. When it's required, I think that it just feels like a chore, something I have to do.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try to read as much as you can right now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I’m a really slow reader, and I have a lot of issues with reading, so when I have a specific time, it puts more pressure on me.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying. We need to stick to the schedule.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: It makes it a lot more difficult for me to read. I don't want to do it, so I'm just not going to complete this required reading.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please open your required English book to the next chapter. You have twenty minutes to complete the reading before the assignment is due.

STUDENT: The reading parts, I suffer in 'cause I just don't like school reading. When it's required, I think that it just feels like a chore, something I have to do.

TUTOR: Just try to read as much as you can right now.

STUDENT: I’m a really slow reader, and I have a lot of issues with reading, so when I have a specific time, it puts more pressure on me.

TUTOR: Keep trying. We need to stick to the schedule.

STUDENT: It makes it a lot more difficult for me to read. I don't want to do it, so I'm just not going to complete this required reading.

context.environment: Traditional English or remedial reading courses
context.materials: Required reading books, traditional English assignments

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When given a specific time to complete the reading
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Refused to complete the required reading
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Puts more pressure on me and makes it a lot more difficult for me to read
related_quotes: I’m a really slow reader, and I have a lot of issues with reading, so when I have a specific time, it puts more pressure on me and makes it a lot more difficult for me to read.

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: I suffer in ‘cause I just don’t like school reading
behavior_patterns.internal_state: It just feels like a chore, something I have to do, and I don’t want to do it
related_quotes: When it’s required, I think that it just feels like a chore, something I have to do, and I don’t want to do it.
